rationale: Elec. Code §253.131 governs civil liability for unlawful campaign contributions or expenditures. It has no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A person who knowingly makes or accepts a campaign contribution or makes a campaign expenditure in violation of this chapter is liable for damages as provided by this section.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict exists.
